sections.paragraph:
Original: מעיני מעוּני o

Transliteration: me‛ûnı̂y me‛ı̂ynı̂y

Phonetic: meh-oo-nee'

BDB Definition:

Mehunim or Meunim = "habitations"
  1. a people who lived south of Canaan
  2. a group of returning exiles, perhaps descendants of 1

Origin: probably patrial from H4584

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
